main.whereLabel: Where would you like to go?

security.title: Security
security.enabledHint: {{label}} is enabled. You can sign in without typing your password.
security.disabledHint: Sign in with your email and password to enable {{label}}.
security.unavailableHint: Biometric login is not available on this device. Please ensure you have Face ID, Touch ID, or fingerprint set up in your device settings.

myData.title: Your Data
myData.downloadSubtext: Export all your data as a JSON file.
myData.clearSubtext: This will clear all current data on this account.
myData.closeSubtext: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

confirm.clearDescription: This will permanently delete your scan history and all family profiles. Your account and preferences will remain intact.
confirm.closeDescription: This will permanently delete your profile, scan history, family members, preferences, and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

error.clearFailed: Failed to clear your data. Please try again.
error.exportFailedMessage: Something went wrong while exporting your data. Please try again.
error.closeFailed: Failed to close your account. Please contact support.

offlineDb.title: Offline Database
offlineDb.description: Download regional food databases for offline barcode scanning. Once downloaded, scans work without an internet connection.

confirm.deleteAllDescription: This will remove all downloaded food databases from your device. You can download them again at any time. Your scan history will not be affected.
confirm.deleteOneDescription: This will remove the {{label}} food database from your device. You can download it again at any time.

password.title: Change Password
password.subtitle: Enter your current password and choose a new one.

error.verifyFailed: Unable to verify your identity. Please try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Password updated
success.body: Your password has been changed successfully.
